calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Continued To May-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Micheal Hall for and with Charmeynne Wheeler. Andy Chan for Sharon Atris. Badma Gutchinon for and with Charles Nelson Jr. Vernon Goins for and with Patricia hendrix.

Mr. Chan reported that Ms. Artis sold the property located in San Francisco and that he is close to filing the Final Accounting and closing the estate except that there was a small piece of property that had been sold. Mr. Goins expressed that there is still a disagreement on the statutory fees. The parties presented arguement on the following issues: 1)Missing saxaphone 2)Missing ashes 3)Repairs to personal property 4)Fees. The Court encouraged all parties to meet outside and try to talk things out. Counsel and all interested parties returned to the courtroom at 10:45 a.m and informed the Court that they were not able to resolve the issues. Therefore, they elected to let the Court make a ruling on the pending matters. The Court stated that no ruling could be made on the missing ashes and took the remaining issues under submission. All Counsel are to submit orders leaving the dollar amounts blank.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Doug Handa.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Sale Of The Ledyard Real Property
Off Calendar Oct-31-2007 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Sale Of The Ledyard Real Property
Off Calendar Aug-28-2007 Continued To Oct-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, FEES
Off Calendar Aug-28-2007 Continued To Oct-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Badma Gutchinov appearing for Charles Nelson, Jr.. Andy Tran appearing for Sharon Artis, successor trustee. Brian Hilliard appearing for Patricia Hendrix, former trustee. Michael Hall appearing for and with objector Charmeynne Wheeler. Court inquired about the status of the sale of the Ledyard real property. Mr. Tran reported that the trustee has received some offer but they were low are were rejected. The trustee intented to take if off the market for a month. Mr. Hilliard reported the personal properties were distributed by the former trustee and she has perform her duties as the trustee. Mr. Gutchinov argued that the former trustee had not market the property properly. Court stated that the former trustee has overpaid herself $5,700.00. Court wanted a status report on the personal properties and receipts from the beneficiaries receiving the property. Also a receipt from Ms. Artis for funds she received from the former trustee. All matters are continued to 10/31.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Sale Of The Ledyard Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Continued To Aug-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Sale Of The Ledyard Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-20-2007 Continued To Jul-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Badma Gutchinov appearing for and with Charles Nelson. Andy Tran appearing for Sharon Actis, successor trustee. Brian Hilliard appearing for Vernon Goins for Patricia Hendrix. Ms. Actis has filed her acceptance. She will file a petition to confirm her appointment. The first house was sold. The second house is not sold and the personal property is still in disputed. Mr. Hilliard wanted to presented his statement for fees. Court instruced Ms. Hendrix to turn over all assets to the successor trustee and she is to file her final accounting with the request for attorney fees. Mr. Tran will file an exparte petition for appointment of successor trustee. Matter is continued to 7/25.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: M. Anderson.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of The Sale Of The Ledyard Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Continued To Jun-20-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Yasmin Gilani appearing for former trustee Patricia Hendrix. Ms. Hendrix has resigned. Ms. Artis will sign the acceptance of the appointment. Counsel will re-submit the order to distribute personal property. June Nelson was in court and she stated not all of the personal property was distributed. Matter is continued to 6/20 for status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Hall (Counsel for Charmeynne Wheeler, Objector/Beneficiary); Vernon Goins (Counsel for Patricia Hendrix, Trustee); Badma Gutchinov (Counsel for Charles Nelson, Jr., Beneficiary); Charmeynne Wheeler (Objector/Beneficiary); Patricia Hendrix (Trustee); Charles Nelson, Jr. (Beneficiary); June Nelson (Beneficiary in pro per).

At the outset, Ms. Nelson requested a continuance of the matter to pursue objections to the accounting. After presentation and rebuttal, the Court denied the request. A discussion then ensued as to the propriety of the Trust paying the expenses of the deceased Trustor's autopsy whereupon the Trustee agreed to pay those expenses upon the submission of proper documentation (including costs advanced by Ms. Wheeler). The Court also recommended that the family expedite the distribution of the remaining personal property. Mr. Goins is to facilitate this process.

After further discussion concerning the fees taken by the Trustee during the accounting period, the Court found that the Trustee received excess fees in the amount of $4,577.00 which are to be deducted from her future fees. The Court otherwise approved the Petition on the First Account. Mr. Goins is to prepare the Order.

Finally, brief discussion ensued about the status of the remaining parcel of real property in the trust and the efforts to sell the same. In the absence of such efforts, the Court set the matter for hearing on April 25, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for status on the sale of the real property.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Deputy Teresa Fox; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
Off Calendar Feb-20-2007 Continued To Mar-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Vernon Goins appearing for trustee Patricia Hendrix. Badma Gutchinov appearing for Mr. Nelson Jr. Francisco Gutierrez appearing for Charmeynne Wheeler. Mr. Gutierrez requested for more time to review the information and to file objections. All counsel agreed to a continuance to 3/14. Mr. Gutchinov wants to have bank statements and have the trustee appear on 3/14. Mr. Gutierrez will file his objections no later than 3/8.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

The 1st account was filed. Matter is continued to 11/28. Court will call the referee. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Susan Lee CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petn. For Order Compelling Trustee To Report
Off Calendar Aug-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Michael Hall and Francisco Gutierrez appearing for and with petitioner. Vernon Goins appearing for Patricia Hendrix, successor trustee. June Nelson is in court. Court asks her to give counsel her current address. Court is ordering the successor trustee to file an inventory of all of the trust assets within 30 days. Accounting is premature at this time. Mr. Hall will prepare an order. Status on filing of inventory is set on 10/17. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
